installCommand: if [ -f package.json ]; then npm install; else echo "Skipping npm install"; fi
buildCommand: if command -v flutter >/dev/null 2>&1; then FLUTTER_BIN=$(command -v flutter); elif [ -x "$PWD/.flutter-sdk/bin/flutter" ]; then FLUTTER_BIN="$PWD/.flutter-sdk/bin/flutter"; else git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 -b stable .flutter-sdk && FLUTTER_BIN="$PWD/.flutter-sdk/bin/flutter"; fi && "$FLUTTER_BIN" config --enable-web && "$FLUTTER_BIN" pub get && "$FLUTTER_BIN" build web --release --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-https://api.yourdomain.com} && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -R build/web/. dist/
